title: hypericum hircinum
intro: Hypericum hircinum, also known as St. John's Wort or Goatweed, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Hypericum hircinum include its ability to improve mood, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of depression, as well as its antiseptic and wound-healing properties. Hypericum hircinum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds, or taken orally to support mental health and well-being.
